tracks.meaning: a numerical value calculated by summing quantities and dividing by the number of quantities, typically representing a central tendency
of middling or ordinary quality; neither good nor bad
a medium or middle position between extremes in price, performance, or market positioning
an adjustment of a loss or damage claim by an insurer to a fair and reasonable amount
the mean damage or loss to a ship or cargo during a voyage, or the liability for such damage
a financial metric expressing the typical or mean value of a security, asset, or investment over a period
to achieve or calculate an arithmetic mean or typical value from a set of quantities
